ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical product */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* Harmonized System code for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chemical product */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the chemical product */,
  "hazmat_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator for hazardous materials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariff_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff rate entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical product */,
  "base_rate" TEXT /* Base rate for the product (MFN 2007) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tariff rate */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., MFN, preferential, or special rate) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tariff rate */,
  "rate_value" TEXT /* Value of the tariff rate */,
  "rate_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the tariff rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariff_rates_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariff_rates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES chemical_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trade analyst, customs broker) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical product accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES chemical_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., USA, CHN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade agreement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the agreement became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory compliance requirement */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory compliance requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory compliance requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_rate_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical rate change */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tariff rate that changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate change occurred */,
  "new_rate" TEXT /* New tariff rate value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariff_exemptions" (
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff exemption */,
  "exemption_name" TEXT /* Name of the tariff exemption */,
  "exemption_description" TEXT /* Description of the tariff exemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the product supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the product supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports_of_entry" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port of entry */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port of entry */,
  "port_address" TEXT /* Address of the port of entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)
